title: Understand: sexual and asexual reproduction
description: Check your understanding of sexual and asexual reproduction in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these occurs during reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Parents pass genetic information to offspring.
One or two offspring produce parents.
Offspring inherit traits from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these occurs during reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring pass traits to their parents.
One or two parents produce offspring.
Offspring inherit genes from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these occurs during reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Parents pass genetic information to offspring.
One or two parents produce offspring.
Offspring inherit traits from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which type of reproduction involves only one parent?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: asexual reproduction
sexual reproduction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which type of reproduction involves two parents?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: sexual reproduction
asexual reproduction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is true about sexual reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It requires two parents.
It requires only one parent.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which type of reproduction results in offspring that are genetically identical to a parent?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: asexual reproduction
sexual reproduction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which type of reproduction results in offspring that have a mix of genes from their parents?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: sexual reproduction
asexual reproduction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is true about asexual reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring are genetically identical to their parent.
Offspring have a mix of genes from their parents.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement is true about BOTH sexual and asexual reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring get genes from more than one parent.
Genes are passed from parents to offspring.
Offspring have different combinations of traits compared to their parents.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement is true about sexual reproduction, but NOT asexual reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring get genes from a single parent.
Genetic information passes from parents to offspring.
Offspring have different combinations of traits compared to their parents.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement is true about asexual reproduction, but NOT sexual reproduction?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring get genes from a single parent.
Genetic information passes from parents to offspring.
Offspring have different combinations of traits compared to their parents.
